speaker: speaker1
text: Can you tell me where the pots and pans are ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Pots and pans are right over there .

speaker: speaker2
text: Could I interest you in our store credit card ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No , thanks . I already have credit cards .

speaker: speaker2
text: But our credit card saves you 10 percent .

speaker: speaker2
text: Here . Let me give you an application form .

speaker: speaker1
text: Thank you , but I'm just browsing today .
